languages.text: {n}Решение Вольного Торговца приходится по душе не всем — вы видите кривые улыбки и напряженные взгляды. Однако спорить не осмеливается никто.{/n}
{n}The Rogue Trader's decision is not to everyone's liking — you see wry smiles and tense looks. But no one dares to argue.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Решение Вольного Торговца приходится по душе не всем — вы видите кривые улыбки и напряженные взгляды. Однако спорить не осмеливается никто.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The Rogue Trader's decision is not to everyone's liking — you see wry smiles and tense looks. But no one dares to argue.{/n}
{n}The Rogue Trader's decision is not to everyone's liking — you see wry smiles and tense looks. But no one dares to argue.{/n}
{n}The Rogue Trader's decision is not to everyone's liking — you see wry smiles and tense looks. But no one dares to argue.{/n}

languages.text: {n}行商浪人的决定并非人人赞同——你看见讥讽的微笑，也看见紧张的神情，但无人敢出言反对。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader's decision is not to everyone's liking — you see wry smiles and tense looks. But no one dares to argue.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}行商浪人的决定并非人人赞同——你看见讥讽的微笑，也看见紧张的神情，但无人敢出言反对。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La décision du libre-marchand ne plaît pas à tout le monde, à en croire les sourires en coin et les regards tendus, mais personne n'ose élever la voix.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader's decision is not to everyone's liking — you see wry smiles and tense looks. But no one dares to argue.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La décision du libre-marchand ne plaît pas à tout le monde, à en croire les sourires en coin et les regards tendus, mais personne n'ose élever la voix.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La decisión del Comerciante Independiente no satisface a todos. Hay sonrisas por una parte y rostros tensos por otro, pero nadie se atreve a discutir.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader's decision is not to everyone's liking — you see wry smiles and tense looks. But no one dares to argue.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La decisión del Comerciante Independiente no satisface a todos. Hay sonrisas por una parte y rostros tensos por otro, pero nadie se atreve a discutir.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Hür Tacir'in kararı, herkesin hoşuna gitmiyor. Buruk gülümsemeler ve gergin bakışlar görüyorsun. Ancak kimse itiraz etmeye cesaret edemiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader's decision is not to everyone's liking — you see wry smiles and tense looks. But no one dares to argue.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Hür Tacir'in kararı, herkesin hoşuna gitmiyor. Buruk gülümsemeler ve gergin bakışlar görüyorsun. Ancak kimse itiraz etmeye cesaret edemiyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nicht alle stimmen der Entscheidung des Freihändlers zu ... du siehst sarkastische Lächeln und angespannte Blicke. Aber niemand wagt es, zu widersprechen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader's decision is not to everyone's liking — you see wry smiles and tense looks. But no one dares to argue.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nicht alle stimmen der Entscheidung des Freihändlers zu ... du siehst sarkastische Lächeln und angespannte Blicke. Aber niemand wagt es, zu widersprechen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}不正取引の決断は、誰もが喜ぶものではない。皮肉な笑みと緊張した表情が浮かぶ。しかし、誰も意見を言おうとはしない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader's decision is not to everyone's liking — you see wry smiles and tense looks. But no one dares to argue.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}不正取引の決断は、誰もが喜ぶものではない。皮肉な笑みと緊張した表情が浮かぶ。しかし、誰も意見を言おうとはしない。{/n}
